rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule governs alternative teacher preparation certification requirements. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative effect.
quote: In proposing rules under this subchapter regarding training requirements for a candidate who has previously earned a degree and is seeking certification through an alternative teacher preparation route, the board shall establish:
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses educator preparation and has no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
